name: TFF PHARMAC.INC.  DL-,001
summary: TFF Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing innovative drug products based on its Thin Film Freezing (TFF) technology platform. TFF technology allows for the dry powder formulation of drugs, improving their delivery, efficacy, and stability. The company is headquartered in Austin, Texas
